reviews.review_description: Since it's multiplayer, the other player never showed up so I couldn't play because I had no one to play with

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback, and we’re really sorry that you weren’t able to play.
Matchmaking can sometimes take longer depending on player availability, and we understand how frustrating it is to wait for a match that doesn’t start.

We are currently working on improvements such as:

Faster and more reliable matchmaking

Adding bots / solo mode so players can play instantly

Better notifications and fallback options when no players are available

Your comment helps us prioritize these features, and we truly appreciate you letting us know.
We hope you’ll give the game another try once these updates are live — the experience will be much smoother.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: I bought it and also gifted it to my friend and unfortunately neither of us could play the game, it wouldn't connect to an opponent and we couldn't play. This game has potential so I suggest you fix it and also add the single user option, Otherwise this game is useless. I will wait excited for the next updates to see if it works then. Thank you... 🙂

developer_response.body:
Dear user,

Thank you for sharing your feedback and suggestions. We're sorry to hear about the connectivity issues you and your friend experienced. Have you tried creating a private room and connecting that way? This might help resolve the issue.

Your suggestion for a single-player option is noted, and we appreciate your patience and enthusiasm as we work on improving the game. Stay tuned for updates, and thank you for your support!

Best regards,

reviews.review_description: My friend and I got it, and we’re playing together—it’s so much fun! :-D It’s a great game to play with a friend. Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you, your comment motivated us a lot. Have fun!
